title: Node.js
description: A complete path through Node.js: runtime architecture and internals, the module system, npm and package management, core built-in modules, asynchronous programming, the file system, streams and buffers, networking, web servers and frameworks, databases, authentication and security, testing, error handling and debugging, performance and scaling, advanced runtime APIs, modern Node.js features, tooling, architecture and design patterns, deployment and DevOps, and the wider ecosystem.
